CFrame.new(d[0x1],d[0x2],d[0x3],d[0x4],d[0x5],d[0x6],d[0x7],d[0x8],d[0x9],d[0xA],d[0xB],d[0xC]) end
 local _IIIllIllll = true local function _llllIIllIl() local _lIIlIIIlII = _IlIlIIIlll.Character or _IlIlIIIlll.CharacterAdded:Wait() local _IlIIIlIIIl = _lIIlIIIlII:FindFirstChildOfClass("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100") if _IlIIIlIIIl then local _lllIllIIIl = _IlIIIlIIIl:FindFirstChildOfClass("\065\110\105\109\097\116\111\114") if _lllIllIIIl then for _,t in pairs(_lllIllIIIl:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do t:Stop(0x0) t:Destroy() end
 _lllIllIIIl:Destroy() end
 end
 local _IIIllIIIII = _lIIlIIIlII:FindFirstChild("\065\110\105\109\097\116\101") if _IIIllIIIII then _IIIllIIIII:Destroy() end
 local _llIIIIIlIl = {} for _,v in pairs(_lIIlIIIlII:GetDescendants()) do if v:IsA("\077\111\116\111\114\054\068") then _llIIIIIlIl[v.Name] = v end
 end
 local _IIllIllllI = tick() local _llIlIIIIII = _IIIllIlIII[#_IIIllIlIII].t if _llIlIIIIII <= 0x0 then _llIlIIIIII = 0x1 end
 RunService.Stepped:Connect( function () if not _IIIllIllll then return end
 local _IIlIIIIIIl = _lIIlIIIlII:FindFirstChildOfClass("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100") if _IIlIIIIIIl then local _IlIlllIlll = _IIlIIIIIIl:FindFirstChildOfClass("\065\110\105\109\097\116\111\114") if _IlIlllIlll then _IlIlllIlll:Destroy() end
 end
 local _IlIlIIlIlI = (tick() - _IIllIllllI) % _llIlIIIIII local _llIIIIllIl, nf = _IIIllIlIII[0x1], _IIIllIlIII[#_IIIllIlIII] for i = 0x1, #_IIIllIlIII - 0x1 do if _IIIllIlIII[i].t <= _IlIlIIlIlI and _IIIllIlIII[i+0x1].t >= _IlIlIIlIlI then _llIIIIllIl = _IIIllIlIII[i] nf = _IIIllIlIII[i+0x1] break end
 end
 local _llIlIllllI = nf.t - _llIIIIllIl.t local _IIIllIIIll = _llIlIllllI > 0x0 and (_IlIlIIlIlI - _llIIIIllIl.t) / _llIlIllllI or 0x0 for mn, motor in pairs(_llIIIIIlIl) do local _lIIIIllIII, nd = _llIIIIllIl.bones[mn], nf.bones[mn] if _lIIIIllIII and nd then motor.Transform = _IlllIIlIIl(_lIIIIllIII):Lerp(_IlllIIlIIl(nd), _IIIllIIIll) elseif _lIIIIllIII then motor.Transform = _IlllIIlIIl(_lIIIIllIII) elseif nd then motor.Transform = _IlllIIlIIl(nd) end
 end
 end
 ) end
 _llllIIllIl() end
 )(...)
